title: Major model provider cuts inference prices 70%
executive_summary: A major model provider cut inference prices by 70% today.
deep_dive: A major model provider cut inference prices by 70% today. The change applies across their flagship and small models. Analysts expect competitors to follow within weeks. AI Authority and its content products run directly on these models.
why_it_matters: It carries revenue potential, a clear opportunity, strategic value and directly touches AI Authority.
immediate_actions: Act now on this for AI Authority.
Brief the executive and assign an owner today.
future_implications: Likely to shape the market over the long term.
Signals an innovation worth positioning around.
follow_up_recommendations: Schedule a follow-up review in one week.
